title: ctenitis muluensis
intro: Ctenitis muluensis is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to Sarawak in East Malaysia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain pathogens and reduce inflammation. Studies have shown that Ctenitis muluensis offers several health benefits, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help protect against cell damage and alleviate conditions such as arthritis and eczema. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often dried and made into a tea or infused in hot water to harness its medicinal properties.
